response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has impressive experience as a Staff Software Engineer at Google and Senior Software Developer at Meta, with strong expertise in TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS), and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP). His background in building production-grade systems and leadership in technical domains aligns well with the role. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of AI-driven solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems, which are key requirements. His open-source contributions and technical leadership are notable strengths.
strengths: 8+ years of senior-level experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Strong background in cloud platforms (AWS, TypeScript) and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP)
Proven technical leadership and mentorship through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No explicit mention of AI-driven solutions, vector databases, or RAG architectures in resume
Lacks experience with multi-agent system frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
Minimal evidence of Python experience, which is a required qualification
